The '''[[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] strength amplifier''' was a device that used microbursts of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] energy to assist actions in combat, giving the appearance that the user was stronger than normal.

==Behind the scenes==
The Eriadu strength amplifier was an equip-able item for all party members in Knights of the Old Republic and Knights of the Old Republic II games.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
